import React from 'react'; import PageLogo from '../Logo/GnuLinuxLogo.svg'; import HeaderInfoBackgroundImage from '../Background/HeaderInfoBackgroundImage.jpg'; import HeaderInfoGitHubLogo from '../Logo/GitHubLogo.svg'; import '../HeaderInfo.css'; class HeaderInfo extends React.Component { constructor(props) { super(props); this.state = { domainLogo: props.domainLogo || PageLogo, currentPageName: props.currentPageName || '', backgroundImage: props.backgroundImage || HeaderInfoBackgroundImage, githubLogo: props.githubLogo || HeaderInfoGitHubLogo, githubURL: props.githubURL || "www.github.com", githubPagesURL: props.githubPagesURL || "www.github.com", domainName: props.domainName || "www.unix69.githubio.com", pageName: props.pageName || "Unix69", headerTitleInfoClass: props.headerTitleInfoClass || "header-title-info", headerTitleInfoBackgroundImageClass: props.headerTitleInfoBackgroundImageClass || "header-title-info-background-image", headerTitleInfoDomainInfoClass: props.headerTitleInfoClass || "header-title-info-domain-info", headerTitleInfoDomainUrlClass: props.headerTitleInfoDomainUrlClass || "header-title-info-domain-url", headerTitleInfoDomainLogoClass: props.headerTitleInfoDomainLogoClass || "header-title-info-domain-logo", headerMainInfoClass: props.headerTitleInfoClass || "header-main-info", headerMainInfoCurrentPageClass: props.headerMainInfoCurrentPageClass || "header-main-info-current-page", headerMainInfoSpaceClass: props.headerMainInfoSpaceClass || "header-main-info-space", headerMainInfoGitHubInfoClass: props.headerMainInfoGitHubInfoClass || "header-main-info-github-info", headerMainInfoGitHubUrlClass: props.headerMainInfoGitHubUrlClass || "header-main-info-github-url", headerMainInfoGitHubPagesUrlClass: props.headerMainInfoGitHubPagesUrlClass || "header-main-info-github-pages-url", headerMainInfoGitHubLogoClass: props.headerMainInfoGitHubLogoClass || "header-main-info-github-logo", headerMainInfoGitHubPagesLogoClass: props.headerMainInfoGitHubPagesLogoClass || "header-main-info-github-pages-logo", headerSubInfoClass: props.headerSubInfoClass || "header-sub-info", headerSubInfoCurrentPageClass: props.headerSubInfoCurrentPageClass || "header-sub-info-current-page", headerSubInfoSpaceClass: props.headerSubInfoSpaceClass || "header-sub-info-space", headerSubInfoGitHubInfoClass: props.headerSubInfoGitHubInfoClass || "header-sub-info-github-info", headerSubInfoGitHubUrlClass: props.headerSubInfoGitHubUrlClass || "header-sub-info-github-url", headerSubInfoGitHubPagesUrlClass: props.headerSubInfoGitHubPagesUrlClass || "header-sub-info-github-pages-url", headerSubInfoGitHubLogoClass: props.headerSubInfoGitHubLogoClass || "header-sub-info-github-logo", headerSubInfoGitHubPagesLogoClass: props.headerSubInfoGitHubPagesLogoClass || "header-sub-info-github-pages-logo" }; } render() { return (
{this.state.pageName}
{this.state.currentPageName}
{this.state.githubPagesURL}
{this.state.currentPageName}
{this.state.githubPagesURL}
); } } export default HeaderInfo;
